flashcards.definition: The ratio of the standard deviation to the mean, expressed as a percentage: CV = (s / x̄) × 100%.
Variability expressed in proportion to the mean, allowing fair comparisons between datasets of different scales.
A statistic with no units, enabling comparison across datasets measured in different units.
Indicates greater relative spread or inconsistency in the data relative to its mean.
Indicates less relative spread — data are more consistent relative to their mean.
